nasb.text: and that every tongue will confess that Jesus Christ is Lord, to the glory of God the Father.

esv.text: and every tongue confess that Jesus Christ is Lord, to the glory of God the Father.

cnv.text: 並且口裡承認耶穌基督為主，使榮耀歸給父　神。

ccb.text: 无不口称耶稣基督是主， 将荣耀归于父上帝。

csbs.text: 万口为了父神的荣耀 要承认耶稣基督是主。
